title: GR's aatrox: epic fight & better combat
body:
![desc1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c22273fdb81513eb3efb6a248728d8a6939626.png)

This mod will support latest version of minecraft.

But it may take some time to update the mod to the latest version!

![desc2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d68cd489b7d8c9daa4068b23c780cd2f30f6eed_0.webp)

This mod adds Aatrox, the champion of League of Legends, to Minecraft!

![desc3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc2f32888ba0c1ec88b1d33d7f2a10db7526c35b_0.webp)

Monster entities spawn infected by darkin with a 10% chance.

If the entity infected with darkin dies, you can get darkin fragment.

(You can craft Aatrox's equipment with a Darkin fragment)

![desc4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccebc1c4b7eaa0e352721e91e50aa1cd71367289.png)

Aatrox's sword has special skill. (+visual effect)

![desc5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a98330c5a04048c131f2026751379735f2b2b99a_0.webp)

compatible with better combat mod :)

![desc6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec2ab17c6b21cb3a2c92ca57ba22f090f2d7693e_0.webp)

compatible with epic fight mod + weapons of miracles mod :)

and.....

[incompatible mod]

=> optifine

=> skin layers 3D
